title: Single-Cell and Bulk Transcriptomics Uncover the Cellular Ecosystem of Vascular Invasion in Intrahepatic Cholangiocarcinoma.
snippet: Intrahepatic cholangiocarcinoma (ICC) is an aggressive liver malignancy with a rising global incidence and limited therapeutic options. Vascular invasion (VI) is a hallmark of advanced disease, correlating with early recurrence and dismal prognosis, yet its tumor microenvironment (TME) drivers remain elusive.
